ddt:Target.Name: N_H60A_USM_20180119
ddt:Target.Description:
[3] 2018/1/19 Nissan XX6 N.Okutsu Add Vehicle project for H60A. Remove Vehicle project except H60A. [[2.17]]
[2] 2017/10/31 Nissan XX6 C.Kudo Changed ReadDTC's 3rd byte to "AF". [[2.17]]
--- <1.00>2007/10/22 NISSAN XX4 A.Yagai 1st [[2.17]]
<1.01>2008/5/30 XX4 YAGAI Following DTC is added. -Inhibit Cut OFF Short failure<A0A0> [2.17]
<1.02>2008/6/11 XX4 YAGAI "OBD Status" was set to devaices "D000". [2.17]
<1.03>2009/2/19 XX4 R. Urushihata Rquest "CAN DIAG SUPPORT MNTR.can" modified. [2.17]
<1.04>2010/7/27 XX4 K.Jousyu Add item DM, DTC. [2.17]
<1.04>2013/6/20 XX2 S.Saito Add DM, DTC. [2.17]
<1.05>2013/09/25 XX2 K.Niiho Add item DM. [2.17]

Item.Text: rear defrost requested and not engaged
rear defrost not requested and engaged
ST relay off & INHI relay off
ST relay off & INHI relay on
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)
